The combined surface passed 3 extension transport tests, 4 realtime facade tests, and 12 realtime crate tests, providing shared-contract evidence across extension transports and realtime normalization/runtime behavior.

Realtime test lists reused from VAL-RT-001 and VAL-RT-002/003 to confirm aligned normalized audio/event/runtime coverage.

frictions: `cargo test -q` reported only aggregate pass counts, so supplemental `cargo test -- --list` runs were needed to capture named terminal evidence tying each assertion to concrete test cases.
summary: Tested 4 assigned realtime cargo assertions; VAL-RT-001, VAL-RT-002, VAL-RT-003, and VAL-CROSS-003 all passed with zero blockers.
